digest.component_or_area: plan-review store-wide overlap detector + config flip in rebar.toml
propositions: Set verify.overlap_enabled = true in the tracked rebar.toml to activate the cross-ticket overlap detector for this project, with no source code change.
Enabling the flag activates the advisory plan-review overlap step that populates overlap[] on the verdict without ever blocking a claim or close.
Enabling the flag also activates the opportunistic enrichment drain (maybe_drain) invoked from ticket write paths, which builds BM25F digests best-effort and can never fail a write.
The enrichment drain is independently disableable via overlap_drain = "off" under [tool.rebar.llm], and rollback is setting overlap_enabled back to false to disable both paths.

Enabling overlap_enabled=true broke 7 tests in test_enrich_drain.py because maybe_drain reads ambient cwd config with repo_root=None, spawning drain children during test setup that polluted spies and emptied the queue.
Fix pins REBAR_LLM_OVERLAP_DRAIN=off in the test repo fixture so setup writes do not auto-drain while drain-mode tests still opt in explicitly.
